provenance: Redacted from the real StreamKill test fixtures. Recipient name and any personal identifiers stripped; vendor sender addresses (public) retained. No inbox bodies beyond the receipt lines, no tokens, no account identifiers.

receipts.subject: Your YouTube Premium membership
receipts.snippet: Hello [redacted-name], this is a receipt for your YouTube Premium membership. YouTube Premium (monthly). Amount: $13.99.

receipts.subject: Your receipt from Netflix
receipts.snippet: Hi [redacted-name], thanks for being a member. Plan: Premium (4K Ultra HD). Amount charged: $15.49. Next billing date 2026-07-14.

receipts.subject: Your Spotify Premium receipt
receipts.snippet: Your Spotify Premium Individual plan has renewed. Premium Individual (monthly). Total: $11.99.

receipts.subject: Your Hulu receipt
receipts.snippet: Thanks for subscribing to Hulu. Hulu (With Ads) - monthly. You were charged $9.99.

receipts.subject: Your Disney+ annual subscription
receipts.snippet: Hi [redacted-name], your Disney+ subscription has renewed for another year. Disney+ Premium (yearly). Total charged: $159.99.

receipts.subject: Your receipt from Apple
receipts.snippet: Hi [redacted-name], your receipt for your subscription. Audible Premium Plus (Monthly). Amount: $15.99. Auto-renews 2026-07-22.

receipts.subject: Your Amazon.com order has shipped
receipts.snippet: Your order has shipped. Order #[redacted-order]. 1x paperback. Order total: $42.31. This was a one-time purchase, not a subscription.
